expectations.evidence: File daily_count.info.yml exists with name: Daily Count, type: module, core_version_requirement: ^10
hook_cron() uses State API for interval checking AND queues work to QueueWorker rather than executing directly
Uses both @QueueWorker annotation (DailyCountArticleCount plugin) AND \Drupal::state() for last-run tracking
ArticleCounter uses injected logger: $this->logger->info('Daily count: @count published Article nodes.')
